documents with a filter from a node (used for shard migration).\n287\t    async fn fetch_documents(\n288\t        &self,\n289\t        _node: &NodeId,\n290\t        _address: &str,\n291\t        _request: &FetchDocumentsRequest,\n292\t    ) -> std::result::Result<FetchDocumentsResponse, NodeError> {\n293\t        Ok(FetchDocumentsResponse {\n294\t            results: Vec::new(),\n295\t            limit: _request.limit,\n296\t            offset: _request.offset,\n297\t            total: 0,\n298\t        })\n299\t    }\n300\t}\n301\t\n302\t#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\n303\tpub enum NodeError {\n304\t    Timeout,\n305\t    HttpError { status: u16, body: String },\n306\t    NetworkError(String),\n307\t}\n308\t\n309\t#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\n310\tpub struct SearchRequest {\n311\t    pub index_uid: String,\n312\t    pub query: Option<String>,\n313\t    pub offset: usize,\n314\t    pub limit: usize,\n315\t    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n316\t    pub facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n317\t    pub ranking_score: bool,\n318\t    pub body: Value,\n319\t    /// Global IDF data from the preflight phase (OP#4).\n320\t    pub global_idf: Option<GlobalIdf>,\n321\t}\n322\t\n323\timpl SearchRequest {\n324\t    /// Build the request body for sending to a node.\n325\t    ///\n326\t    /// Injects `showRankingScore: true` unconditionally so the merger can global-sort.\n327\t    /// Each node receives `offset + limit` results to ensure the coordinator has enough\n328\t    /// data to apply pagination.\n329\t    pub fn to_node_body(&self) -> Value {\n330\t        let mut body = self.body.clone();\n331\t\n332\t        // Inject showRankingScore: true unconditionally for global sorting\n333\t        body[\"showRankingScore\"] = serde_json::json!(true);\n334\t\n335\t        // Set limit to offset + limit so we get enough results for pagination\n336\t        // (coordinator applies final offset/limit after merging)\n337\t        body[\"limit\"] = serde_json::json!(self.offset + self.limit);\n338\t\n339\t        // Set offset to 0 on individual nodes (coordinator handles offset)\n340\t        body[\"offset\"] = serde_json::json!(0);\n341\t\n342\t        // Ensure query is set\n343\t        if let Some(q) = &self.query {\n344\t            body[\"q\"] = serde_json::json!(q);\n345\t        }\n346\t\n347\t        // Ensure filter is set if provided\n348\t        if let Some(filter) = &self.filter {\n349\t            body[\"filter\"] = filter.clone();\n350\t        }\n351\t\n352\t        // Ensure facets are set if provided\n353\t        if let Some(facets) = &self.facets {\n354\t            body[\"facets\"] = serde_json::json!(facets);\n355\t        }\n356\t\n357\t        body\n358\t    }\n359\t}\n360\t\n361\t#[derive(Debug)]\n362\tpub struct ScatterResult {\n363\t    pub shard_pages: Vec<ShardHitPage>,\n364\t    pub failed_shards: HashMap<u32, NodeError>,\n365\t    pub partial: bool,\n366\t    pub deadline_exceeded: bool,\n367\t}\n368\t\n369\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\n370\tpub fn plan_search_scatter(\n371\t    topology: &Topology,\n372\t    query_seq: u64,\n373\t    rf: usize,\n374\t    shard_count: u32,\n375\t) -> ScatterPlan {\n376\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n377\t\n378\t    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n379\t        Some(g) => g,\n380\t        None => {\n381\t            return ScatterPlan {\n382\t                chosen_group, target_shards: Vec::new(),\n383\t                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(), deadline_ms: 0, hedging_eligible: false,\n384\t            };\n385\t        }\n386\t    };\n387\t\n388\t    let _covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n389\t\n390\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n391\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n392\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n393\t        let selected = replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone();\n394\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n395\t    }\n396\t\n397\t    ScatterPlan {\n398\t        chosen_group,\n399\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n400\t        shard_to_node,\n401\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n402\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n403\t    }\n404\t}\n405\t\n406\t/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n407\t///\n408\t/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n409\t/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\n410\tpub fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n411\t    topology: &Topology,\n412\t    query_seq: u64,\n413\t    rf: usize,\n414\t    shard_count: u32,\n415\t    index: &str,\n416\t    floor: u64,\n417\t    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n418\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n419\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n420\t\n421\t    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n422\t\n423\t    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n424\t        shard_count,\n425\t        group,\n426\t        rf,\n427\t        query_seq,\n428\t        index,\n429\t        floor,\n430\t        version_checker,\n431\t    )?;\n432\t\n433\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n434\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n435\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n436\t        // Filter by version floor, then rotate by query_seq\n437\t        let eligible: Vec<_> = replicas\n438\t            .iter()\n439\t            .filter(|node_id| {\n440\t                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n441\t                version >= floor\n442\t            })\n443\t            .collect();\n444\t\n445\t        if eligible.is_empty() {\n446\t            return None;\n447\t        }\n448\t\n449\t        let selected = eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()];\n450\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n451\t    }\n452\t\n453\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n454\t        chosen_group,\n455\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n456\t        shard_to_node,\n457\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n458\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n459\t    })\n460\t}\n461\t\n462\t/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n463\t///\n464\t/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n465\t/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\n466\tpub fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n467\t    topology: &Topology,\n468\t    query_seq: u64,\n469\t    rf: usize,\n470\t    shard_count: u32,\n471\t    pinned_group: u32,\n472\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n473\t    let group = topology.group(pinned_group)?;\n474\t\n475\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n476\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n477\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n478\t        if replicas.is_empty() {\n479\t            continue;\n480\t        }\n481\t        let selected = replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone();\n482\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n483\t    }\n484\t\n485\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n486\t        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n487\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n488\t        shard_to_node,\n489\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n490\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n491\t    })\n492\t}\n493\t\n494\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\n495\tpub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n496\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n497\t    client: &C,\n498\t    req: SearchRequest,\n499\t    topology: &Topology,\n500\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n501\t) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n502\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n503\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n504\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n505\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n506\t        }\n507\t    }\n508\t    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n509\t\n510\t    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n511\t    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n512\t    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n513\t\n514\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n515\t    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n516\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n517\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n518\t            None => {\n519\t                for shard_id in shards {\n520\t                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n521\t                }\n522\t                continue;\n523\t            }\n524\t        };\n525\t        let client_ref = client;\n526\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n527\t        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n528\t        let shard_count = shards.len();\n529\t        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n530\t        let span = info_span!(\n531\t            \"scatter_node\",\n532\t            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n533\t            address = %node.address,\n534\t            shard_count = shard_count,\n535\t        );\n536\t        tasks.push(async move {\n537\t            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n538\t            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n539\t        }.instrument(span));\n540\t    }\n541\t\n542\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n543\t\n544\t    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n545\t        match result {\n546\t            Ok(body) => {\n547\t                for _shard_id in shards {\n548\t                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n549\t                }\n550\t            }\n551\t            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n552\t                deadline_exceeded = true;\n553\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n554\t            }\n555\t            Err(e) => {\n556\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n557\t            }\n558\t        }\n559\t    }\n560\t\n561\t    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n562\t\n563\t    match policy {\n564\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n565\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n566\t                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n567\t            }\n568\t        }\n569\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n570\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n571\t            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n572\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n573\t                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n574\t                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n575\t\n576\t                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n577\t                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n578\t\n579\t                    // Try each other replica group\n580\t                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n581\t                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n582\t                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n583\t                        }\n584\t\n585\t                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n586\t                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n587\t                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n588\t                                continue;\n589\t                            }\n590\t\n591\t                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n592\t                            for node_id in replicas {\n593\t                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n594\t                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n595\t                                        Ok(body) => {\n596\t                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n597\t                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n598\t                                            break;\n599\t                                        }\n600\t                                        Err(_) => {\n601\t                                            continue; // Try next replica\n602\t                                        }\n603\t                                    }\n604\t                                }\n605\t                            }\n606\t\n607\t                            if fallback_succeeded {\n608\t                                break; // Found a working replica\n609\t                            }\n610\t                        }\n611\t                    }\n612\t\n613\t                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n614\t                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n615\t                    }\n616\t                }\n617\t\n618\t                // Merge fallback results\n619\t                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n620\t\n621\t                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n622\t                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n623\t                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n624\t                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n625\t                        shard_pages,\n626\t                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n627\t                        partial: false,\n628\t                        deadline_exceeded,\n629\t                    });\n630\t                } else {\n631\t                    // Some shards still failed\n632\t                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n633\t                }\n634\t            }\n635\t        }\n636\t    }\n637\t\n638\t    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n639\t}\n640\t\n641\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n642\tpub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n643\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n644\t    client: &C,\n645\t    req: SearchRequest,\n646\t    topology: &Topology,\n647\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n648\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n649\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n650\t    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n651\t\n652\t    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n653\t    if scatter_result.partial {\n654\t        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n655\t            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n656\t                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n657\t            });\n658\t        }\n659\t    }\n660\t\n661\t    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n662\t    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n663\t\n664\t    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n665\t        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n666\t        offset: req.offset,\n667\t        limit: req.limit,\n668\t        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n669\t        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n670\t        failed_shards,\n671\t    };\n672\t\n673\t    // Span for the merge operation\n674\t    let _span = info_span!(\n675\t        \"merge\",\n676\t        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n677\t        offset = req.offset,\n678\t        limit = req.limit,\n679\t    ).entered();\n680\t\n681\t    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n682\t}\n683\t\n684\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n685\t// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n686\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n687\t\n688\t/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\n689\tpub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n690\t    match query {\n691\t        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n692\t            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n693\t            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n694\t            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n695\t                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n696\t                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n697\t            }\n698\t            terms\n699\t        }\n700\t        _ => Vec::new(),\n701\t    }\n702\t}\n703\t\n704\t/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n705\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\n706\tpub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n707\t    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n708\t    client: &C,\n709\t    req: &PreflightRequest,\n710\t    topology: &Topology,\n711\t) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n712\t    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n713\t        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n714\t    }\n715\t\n716\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n717\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n718\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n719\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n720\t        }\n721\t    }\n722\t\n723\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n724\t    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n725\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n726\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n727\t            None => continue,\n728\t        };\n729\t        let client_ref = client;\n730\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n731\t        let nid = node_id.clone();\n732\t        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n733\t    }\n734\t\n735\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n736\t    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n737\t    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n738\t}\n739\t\n740\t/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n741\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n742\tpub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n743\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n744\t    client: &C,\n745\t    req: SearchRequest,\n746\t    topology: &Topology,\n747\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n748\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n749\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n750\t    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n751\t        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n752\t        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n753\t        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n754\t    };\n755\t    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n756\t    let mut search_req = req;\n757\t    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n758\t    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n759\t}\n760\t\n761\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n762\t// Mock            serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 0, \"processingTimeMs\": 0, \"facetDistribution\": {}})\n781\t        }))\n782\t    }\n783\t\n784\t    async fn }\n1013\t\n1014\t    #[tokio::test]\n1015\t    async fn test_execute_preflight() {\n1016\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1017\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n1018\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1019\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1020\t            total_docs: 30000, c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1024\t            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1025\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 2500 })]),\n1026\t        });\n1027\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1028\t = make_test_topology();\n1040\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n1041\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1042\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n1043\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1044\t            total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1045\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 500 })]),\n1046\t        });\n1047\t        let s = crate::merger::RrfStrategy::default_strategy();\n1048\t        let r = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(plan, &c, make_req(), &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial, &s).await.unwrap();\n1049\t        assert!(!r.degraded);\n1050\t        assert!(!r.hits.is_empty());\n1051\t    }\n1052\t\n1053\t    /// Integration test for dfs_query_then_fetch with severely skewed shard distribution.\n1054\t    ///\n1055\t    /// This test simulates the scenario described in miroir-yio:\n1056\t    /// - Shard 0: Normal (1,000 docs, term df = 100)\n1057\t    /// - Shard 1: 100x normal (100,000 docs, term df = 10,000)\n1058\t    /// - Shard 2: Near-empty (10 docs, term df = 1)\n1059\t    ///\n1060\t    /// Without global IDF preflight, each shard would compute different local IDF values:\n1061\t    /// - Shard 0: IDF ≈ log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1062\t    /// - Shard 1: IDF ≈ log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1063\t    /// - Shard 2: IDF ≈ log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.8\n1064\t    ///\n1065\t    /// With global IDF preflight, all shards use the same IDF:\n1066\t    /// - Global: N = 101,010, df = 10,101\n1067\t    /// - IDF ≈ log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1068\t    ///\n1069\t    /// This ensures scores are comparable across shards, enabling correct score-based merge.\n1070\t    #[tokio::test]\n1071\t    async fn test_dfs_skewed_shards_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1072\t        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n1073\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n1074\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n1075\t        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n1076\t\n1077\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3);\n1078\t\n1079\t        // Simulate severely skewed shard distribution\n1080\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1081\t\n1082\t        // Shard 0: Normal distribution\n1083\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1084\t            total_docs: 1000,\n1085\t            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1086\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1087\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 100 }),\n1088\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 80 }),\n1089\t            ]),\n1090\t        });\n1091\t\n1092\t        // Shard 1: 100x normal (severely skewed)\n1093\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1094\t            total_docs: 100_000,\n1095\t            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1096\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1097\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 10_000 }),\n1098\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 8_000 }),\n1099\t            ]),\n1100\t        });\n1101\t\n1102\t        // Shard 2: Near-empty\n1103\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1104\t            total_docs: 10,\n1105\t            avg_doc_length: 45.0,\n1106\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n1107\t                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1108\t                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n1109\t            ]),\n1110\t        });\n1111\t\n1112\t        // Execute preflight to get global IDF\n1113\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1114\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1115\t            terms: vec![\"machine\".into(), \"learning\".into()],\n1116\t            filter: None,\n1117\t        };\n1118\t\n1119\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1120\t\n1121\t        // Verify global aggregation\n1122\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 101_010);\n1123\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().df, 10_101);\n1124\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().df, 8_081);\n1125\t\n1126\t        // Verify global IDF is the same for all shards\n1127\t        // Expected IDF for \"machine\": log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1\n1128\t        let expected_idf_machine: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 10101.0 + 0.5) / (10101.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1129\t        let actual_idf_machine = global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().idf;\n1130\t        assert!((actual_idf_machine - expected_idf_machine).abs() < 0.001);\n1131\t\n1132\t        // Expected IDF for \"learning\": log((101010 - 8081 + 0.5) / (8081 + 0.5)) + 1\n1133\t        let expected_idf_learning: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 8081.0 + 0.5) / (8081.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1134\t        let actual_idf_learning = global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().idf;\n1135\t        assert!((actual_idf_learning - expected_idf_learning).abs() < 0.001);\n1136\t\n1137\t        // Verify that without global IDF, local IDF values would differ significantly\n1138\t        // Shard 0 local IDF for \"machine\": log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.19\n1139\t        // Shard 1 local IDF for \"machine\": log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.20\n1140\t        // Shard 2 local IDF for \"machine\": log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.85\n1141\t        let local_idf_shard_0: f64 = ((1000.0_f64 - 100.0 + 0.5) / (100.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1142\t        let local_idf_shard_2: f64 = ((10.0_f64 - 1.0 + 0.5) / (1.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n1143\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - local_idf_shard_0).abs() > 0.2, \"Local IDF values should differ significantly\");\n1144\t        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - actual_idf_machine).abs() > 0.3, \"Global IDF should be closer to large-shard local IDF\");\n1145\t    }\n1146\t\n1147\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles empty query terms gracefully.\n1148\t    #[tokio::test]\n1149\t    async fn test_dfs_empty_query_terms() {\n1150\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1151\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n1152\t        let c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1153\t\n1154\t        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n1155\t            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n1156\t            terms: vec![],\n1157\t            filter: None,\n1158\t        };\n1159\t\n1160\t        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n1161\t        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 0);\n1162\t        assert!(global_idf.terms.is_empty());\n1163\t    }\n1164\t\n1165\t    /// Test that DFS preflight handles partial failures gracefully.\n1166\t    #[tokio::test]\n1167\t    async fn Scatter orchestration: fan-out logic and covering set builder.\n\nuse crate::config::UnavailableShardPolicy;\nuse tracing::{instrument, info_span, Instrument};\nuse crate::merger::{MergeInput, MergedSearchResult, MergeStrategy, ShardHitPage};\nuse crate::router::{covering_set, covering_set_with_version_floor, query_group};\nuse crate::topology::{NodeId, Topology};\nuse crate::Result;\nuse serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};\nuse serde_json::Value;\nuse std::collections::HashMap;\n\n/// Scatter plan: the exact shard→node mapping for a search query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct ScatterPlan {\n    pub chosen_group: u32,\n    pub target_shards: Vec<u32>,\n    pub shard_to_node: HashMap<u32, NodeId>,\n    pub deadline_ms: u32,\n    pub hedging_eligible: bool,\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// §15 OP#4: Global-IDF preflight (dfs_query_then_fetch pattern)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Per-term document frequency from a single shard.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct TermStats {\n    pub df: u64,\n}\n\n/// Preflight request: gather term-frequency statistics from a shard.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct PreflightRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub terms: Vec<String>,\n    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n}\n\n/// Response from a shard's preflight query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct PreflightResponse {\n    pub total_docs: u64,\n    pub avg_doc_length: f64,\n    pub term_stats: HashMap<String, TermStats>,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated global term statistics after coordinator aggregation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GlobalTermStats {\n    pub df: u64,\n    pub idf: f64,\n}\n\n/// Aggregated global IDF data computed at the coordinator.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct GlobalIdf {\n    pub total_docs: u64,\n    pub avg_doc_length: f64,\n    pub terms: HashMap<String, GlobalTermStats>,\n}\n\nimpl GlobalIdf {\n    /// Aggregate per-shard preflight responses into global IDF.\n    pub fn from_preflight_responses(responses: &[PreflightResponse]) -> Self {\n        let mut total_docs = 0u64;\n        let mut total_length = 0.0f64;\n        let mut term_df: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n\n        for resp in responses {\n            total_docs += resp.total_docs;\n            total_length += resp.avg_doc_length * resp.total_docs as f64;\n            for (term, stats) in &resp.term_stats {\n                *term_df.entry(term.clone()).or_insert(0) += stats.df;\n            }\n        }\n\n        let avg_doc_length = if total_docs > 0 {\n            total_length / total_docs as f64\n        } else {\n            0.0\n        };\n\n        let n = total_docs as f64;\n        let terms = term_df\n            .into_iter()\n            .map(|(term, df)| {\n                let idf = if df == 0 {\n                    0.0\n                } else {\n                    ((n - df as f64 + 0.5) / (df as f64 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0\n                };\n                (term, GlobalTermStats { df, idf })\n            })\n            .collect();\n\n        Self { total_docs, avg_doc_length, terms }\n    }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// NodeClient trait\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Write path: document operations (P2.2)\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Request to add/replace documents on a node.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct WriteRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub documents: Vec<Value>,\n    pub primary_key: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Response from a single node's document write operation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct WriteResponse {\n    pub success: bool,\n    pub task_uid: Option<u64>,\n    pub message: Option<String>,\n    pub code: Option<String>,\n    pub error_type: Option<String>,\n}\n\n/// Request to delete documents by IDs.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct DeleteByIdsRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub ids: Vec<String>,\n}\n\n/// Request to delete all documents matching a filter.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct DeleteByFilterRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub filter: Value,\n}\n\n/// Response from a delete operation.\npub type DeleteResponse = WriteResponse;\n\n/// Request to fetch documents with a filter (used for shard migration).\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct FetchDocumentsRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub filter: Value,\n    pub limit: u32,\n    pub offset: u32,\n}\n\n/// Response from a fetch documents operation.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct FetchDocumentsResponse {\n    pub results: Vec<Value>,\n    pub limit: u32,\n    pub offset: u32,\n    pub total: u64,\n}\n\n/// Request to get task status from a node.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct TaskStatusRequest {\n    /// The task UID to query\n    pub task_uid: u64,\n}\n\n/// Response from a single node's task status query.\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]\npub struct TaskStatusResponse {\n    /// The task UID\n    pub task_uid: u64,\n    /// Current task status\n    pub status: String,\n    /// Error message if failed\n    pub error: Option<String>,\n    /// Error type if failed\n    #[serde(rename = \"type\")]\n    pub error_type: Option<String>,\n}\n\nimpl TaskStatusResponse {\n    /// Convert Meilisearch status string to NodeTaskStatus.\n    pub fn to_node_status(&self) -> crate::task::NodeTaskStatus {\n        match self.status.as_str() {\n            \"enqueued\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Enqueued,\n            \"processing\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Processing,\n            \"succeeded\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Succeeded,\n            \"failed\" => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Failed,\n            _ => crate::task::NodeTaskStatus::Enqueued,\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// NodeClient trait\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// HTTP client for communicating with a Meilisearch node.\n#[allow(async_fn_in_trait)]\npub trait NodeClient: Send + Sync {\n    async fn search_node(\n        &self,\n        node: &NodeId,\n        address: &str,\n        request: &SearchRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, NodeError>;\n\n    /// Execute a preflight request (OP#4 global-IDF phase).\n    async fn preflight_node(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &PreflightRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<PreflightResponse, NodeError> {\n        Ok(PreflightResponse { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, term_stats: HashMap::new() })\n    }\n\n    /// Write documents to a node (add/replace).\n    async fn write_documents(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &WriteRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n        Ok(WriteResponse {\n            success: false,\n            task_uid: None,\n            message: Some(\"not implemented\".to_string()),\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// Get task status from a node.\n    fn get_task_status(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &TaskStatusRequest,\n    ) -> impl std::future::Future<Output = std::result::Result<TaskStatusResponse, NodeError>> + Send {\n        async move {\n            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n                task_uid: _request.task_uid,\n                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n                error: None,\n                error_type: None,\n            })\n        }\n    }\n\n    /// Delete documents by IDs from a node.\n    async fn delete_documents(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &DeleteByIdsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: false,\n            task_uid: None,\n            message: Some(\"not implemented\".to_string()),\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// Delete all documents matching a filter from a node.\n    async fn delete_documents_by_filter(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &DeleteByFilterRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: false,\n            task_uid: None,\n            message: Some(\"not implemented\".to_string()),\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    /// Fetch documents with a filter from a node (used for shard migration).\n    async fn fetch_documents(\n        &self,\n        _node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &FetchDocumentsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<FetchDocumentsResponse, NodeError> {\n        Ok(FetchDocumentsResponse {\n            results: Vec::new(),\n            limit: _request.limit,\n            offset: _request.offset,\n            total: 0,\n        })\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub enum NodeError {\n    Timeout,\n    HttpError { status: u16, body: String },\n    NetworkError(String),\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\npub struct SearchRequest {\n    pub index_uid: String,\n    pub query: Option<String>,\n    pub offset: usize,\n    pub limit: usize,\n    pub filter: Option<Value>,\n    pub facets: Option<Vec<String>>,\n    pub ranking_score: bool,\n    pub body: Value,\n    /// Global IDF data from the preflight phase (OP#4).\n    pub global_idf: Option<GlobalIdf>,\n}\n\nimpl SearchRequest {\n    /// Build the request body for sending to a node.\n    ///\n    /// Injects `showRankingScore: true` unconditionally so the merger can global-sort.\n    /// Each node receives `offset + limit` results to ensure the coordinator has enough\n    /// data to apply pagination.\n    pub fn to_node_body(&self) -> Value {\n        let mut body = self.body.clone();\n\n        // Inject showRankingScore: true unconditionally for global sorting\n        body[\"showRankingScore\"] = serde_json::json!(true);\n\n        // Set limit to offset + limit so we get enough results for pagination\n        // (coordinator applies final offset/limit after merging)\n        body[\"limit\"] = serde_json::json!(self.offset + self.limit);\n\n        // Set offset to 0 on individual nodes (coordinator handles offset)\n        body[\"offset\"] = serde_json::json!(0);\n\n        // Ensure query is set\n        if let Some(q) = &self.query {\n            body[\"q\"] = serde_json::json!(q);\n        }\n\n        // Ensure filter is set if provided\n        if let Some(filter) = &self.filter {\n            body[\"filter\"] = filter.clone();\n        }\n\n        // Ensure facets are set if provided\n        if let Some(facets) = &self.facets {\n            body[\"facets\"] = serde_json::json!(facets);\n        }\n\n        body\n    }\n}\n\n#[derive(Debug)]\npub struct ScatterResult {\n    pub shard_pages: Vec<ShardHitPage>,\n    pub failed_shards: HashMap<u32, NodeError>,\n    pub partial: bool,\n    pub deadline_exceeded: bool,\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\npub fn plan_search_scatter(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n) -> ScatterPlan {\n    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n\n    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n        Some(g) => g,\n        None => {\n            return ScatterPlan {\n                chosen_group, target_shards: Vec::new(),\n                shard_to_node: HashMap::new(), deadline_ms: 0, hedging_eligible: false,\n            };\n        }\n    };\n\n    let _covering = covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        let selected = replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone();\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    }\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n///\n/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\npub fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    index: &str,\n    floor: u64,\n    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n\n    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n\n    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n        shard_count,\n        group,\n        rf,\n        query_seq,\n        index,\n        floor,\n        version_checker,\n    )?;\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        // Filter by version floor, then rotate by query_seq\n        let eligible: Vec<_> = replicas\n            .iter()\n            .filter(|node_id| {\n                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n                version >= floor\n            })\n            .collect();\n\n        if eligible.is_empty() {\n            return None;\n        }\n\n        let selected = eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()];\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n    }\n\n    Some(ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    })\n}\n\n/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n///\n/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\npub fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n    topology: &Topology,\n    query_seq: u64,\n    rf: usize,\n    shard_count: u32,\n    pinned_group: u32,\n) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n    let group = topology.group(pinned_group)?;\n\n    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n        if replicas.is_empty() {\n            continue;\n        }\n        let selected = replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone();\n        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n    }\n\n    Some(ScatterPlan {\n        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n        shard_to_node,\n        deadline_ms: 5000,\n        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n    })\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\npub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n        }\n    }\n    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n\n    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n\n    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n            None => {\n                for shard_id in shards {\n                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n                }\n                continue;\n            }\n        };\n        let client_ref = client;\n        let req_clone = req.clone();\n        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n        let shard_count = shards.len();\n        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n        let span = info_span!(\n            \"scatter_node\",\n            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n            address = %node.address,\n            shard_count = shard_count,\n        );\n        tasks.push(async move {\n            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n        }.instrument(span));\n    }\n\n    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n\n    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n        match result {\n            Ok(body) => {\n                for _shard_id in shards {\n                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n                }\n            }\n            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n                deadline_exceeded = true;\n                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n            }\n            Err(e) => {\n                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n\n    match policy {\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n            }\n        }\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n\n                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n\n                    // Try each other replica group\n                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n                        }\n\n                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n                                continue;\n                            }\n\n                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n                            for node_id in replicas {\n                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n                                        Ok(body) => {\n                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n                                            break;\n                                        }\n                                        Err(_) => {\n                                            continue; // Try next replica\n                                        }\n                                    }\n                                }\n                            }\n\n                            if fallback_succeeded {\n                                break; // Found a working replica\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n\n                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n                    }\n                }\n\n                // Merge fallback results\n                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n\n                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n                        shard_pages,\n                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n                        partial: false,\n                        deadline_exceeded,\n                    });\n                } else {\n                    // Some shards still failed\n                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n}\n\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\npub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n\n    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n    if scatter_result.partial {\n        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n            });\n        }\n    }\n\n    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n\n    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n        offset: req.offset,\n        limit: req.limit,\n        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n        failed_shards,\n    };\n\n    // Span for the merge operation\n    let _span = info_span!(\n        \"merge\",\n        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n        offset = req.offset,\n        limit = req.limit,\n    ).entered();\n\n    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\npub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n    match query {\n        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n            }\n            terms\n        }\n        _ => Vec::new(),\n    }\n}\n\n/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\npub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: &PreflightRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n    }\n\n    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n        }\n    }\n\n    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n            None => continue,\n        };\n        let client_ref = client;\n        let req_clone = req.clone();\n        let nid = node_id.clone();\n        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n    }\n\n    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n}\n\n/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\npub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n    plan: ScatterPlan,\n    client: &C,\n    req: SearchRequest,\n    topology: &Topology,\n    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n    };\n    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n    let mut search_req = req;\n    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Mock client\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\npub struct MockNodeClient {\n    pub responses: HashMap<NodeId, Value>,\n    pub preflight_responses: HashMap<NodeId, PreflightResponse>,\n    pub errors: HashMap<NodeId, NodeError>,\n    pub delay_ms: u64,\n}\n\nimpl NodeClient for MockNodeClient {\n    async fn search_node(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &SearchRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, NodeError> {\n        let _ = self.delay_ms;\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 0, \"processingTimeMs\": 0, \"facetDistribution\": {}})\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn preflight_node(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &PreflightRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<PreflightResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(self.preflight_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 1000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::new() }\n        }))\n    }\n\n    async fn write_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &WriteRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(WriteResponse {\n            success: true,\n            task_uid: Some(1),\n            message: None,\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn delete_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByIdsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: true,\n            task_uid: Some(1),\n            message: None,\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn delete_documents_by_filter(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByFilterRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n            success: true,\n            task_uid: Some(1),\n            message: None,\n            code: None,\n            error_type: None,\n        })\n    }\n\n    async fn fetch_documents(\n        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, request: &FetchDocumentsRequest,\n    ) -> std::result::Result<FetchDocumentsResponse, NodeError> {\n        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n        Ok(FetchDocumentsResponse {\n            results: Vec::new(),\n            limit: request.limit,\n            offset: request.offset,\n            total: 0,\n        })\n    }\n\n    fn get_task_status(\n        &self,\n        node: &NodeId,\n        _address: &str,\n        _request: &TaskStatusRequest,\n    ) -> impl std::future::Future<Output = std::result::Result<TaskStatusResponse, NodeError>> + Send {\n        let node = node.clone();\n        let task_uid = _request.task_uid;\n        let error = self.errors.get(&node).cloned();\n        async move {\n            if let Some(err) = error {\n                return Err(err);\n            }\n            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n                task_uid,\n                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n                error: None,\n                error_type: None,\n            })\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n#[cfg(test)]\nmod tests {\n    use super::*;\n    use crate::topology::{Node, NodeId};\n\n    fn make_test_topology() -> Topology {\n        let mut topo = Topology::new(64, 2, 2);\n        for i in 0u32..6 {\n            let rg = if i < 3 { 0 } else { 1 };\n            let mut node = Node::new(NodeId::new(format!(\"node-{i}\")), format!(\"http://node-{i}:7700\"), rg);\n            node.status = crate::topology::NodeStatus::Active;\n            topo.add_node(node);\n        }\n        topo\n    }\n\n    fn make_req() -> SearchRequest {\n        SearchRequest {\n            index_uid: \"test\".into(), query: Some(\"test\".into()),\n            offset: 0, limit: 10, filter: None, facets: None,\n            ranking_score: false, body: serde_json::json!({}), global_idf: None,\n        }\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_plan_pure_function() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n        assert_eq!(plan.chosen_group, 0);\n        assert_eq!(plan.target_shards.len(), 64);\n        assert!(plan.hedging_eligible);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_plan_group_rotation() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        assert_eq!(plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64).chosen_group, 0);\n        assert_eq!(plan_search_scatter(&topo, 1, 2, 64).chosen_group, 1);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_plan_shard_mapping() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n        for s in 0..64 { assert!(plan.shard_to_node.contains_key(&s)); }\n        let g0 = topo.group(0).unwrap();\n        for (_, nid) in &plan.shard_to_node { assert!(g0.nodes().contains(nid)); }\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_plan_hedging() {\n        let mut topo = Topology::new(64, 1, 1);\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"n0\".into()), \"http://n0:7700\".into(), 0));\n        assert!(!plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 64).hedging_eligible);\n        assert!(plan_search_scatter(&make_test_topology(), 0, 2, 64).hedging_eligible);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_scatter_mock() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let     let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), assert!(plan_search_scatter(&Topology::new(64, 0, 1), 0, 1, 64).shard_to_node.is_empty());\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_scatter_node_not_in_topo() {\n        let topo = UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial).await.unwrap();\n        assert!(r.partial);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_sg_rrf() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\"}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n        c.errors.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), NodeError::Timeout);\n        let s = #[test]\n    fn test_extract_query_terms() {\n        assert_eq!(extract_query_terms(&Some(\"hello world hello\".into())), vec![\"hello\", \"world\"]);\n        assert!(extract_query_terms(&None).is_empty());\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_global_idf_aggregation() {\n        let resp = vec![\n            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 5000 })]) },\n            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 60.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 4500 })]) },\n        ];\n        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&resp);\n        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n        assert!((g.avg_doc_length - 55.0).abs() < 0.001);\n        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"a\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n    }\n\n    #[test]\n    fn test_global_idf_empty() {\n        let g = GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&[]);\n        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 0);\n        assert!(g.terms.is_empty());\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_execute_preflight() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 3000 })]),\n        });\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 2500 })]),\n        });\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 40000, avg_doc_length: 52.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 4000 })]),\n        });\n        let req = PreflightRequest { index_uid: \"test\".into(), terms: vec![\"search\".into()], filter: None };\n        let g = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(g.total_docs, 100000);\n        assert_eq!(g.terms.get(\"search\").unwrap().df, 9500);\n    }\n\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_dfs_query_then_fetch() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: let r = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(plan, &c, make_req(), &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial, &s).await.unwrap();\n        assert!(!r.degraded);\n        assert!(!r.hits.is_empty());\n    }\n\n    /// Integration test for dfs_query_then_fetch with severely skewed shard distribution.\n    ///\n    /// This test simulates the scenario described in miroir-yio:\n    /// - Shard 0: Normal (1,000 docs, term df = 100)\n    /// - Shard 1: 100x normal (100,000 docs, term df = 10,000)\n    /// - Shard 2: Near-empty (10 docs, term df = 1)\n    ///\n    /// Without global IDF preflight, each shard would compute different local IDF values:\n    /// - Shard 0: IDF ≈ log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n    /// - Shard 1: IDF ≈ log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n    /// - Shard 2: IDF ≈ log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.8\n    ///\n    /// With global IDF preflight, all shards use the same IDF:\n    /// - Global: N = 101,010, df = 10,101\n    /// - IDF ≈ log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n    ///\n    /// This ensures scores are comparable across shards, enabling correct score-based merge.\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_dfs_skewed_shards_global_idf_aggregation() {\n        let mut topo = Topology::new(3, 1, 1);\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), \"http://node-0:7700\".into(), 0));\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), \"http://node-1:7700\".into(), 0));\n        topo.add_node(Node::new(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), \"http://node-2:7700\".into(), 0));\n\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 1, 3);\n\n        // Simulate severely skewed shard distribution\n        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n\n        // Shard 0: Normal distribution\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 1000,\n            avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 100 }),\n                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 80 }),\n            ]),\n        });\n\n        // Shard 1: 100x normal (severely skewed)\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 100_000,\n            avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 10_000 }),\n                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 8_000 }),\n            ]),\n        });\n\n        // Shard 2: Near-empty\n        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n            total_docs: 10,\n            avg_doc_length: 45.0,\n            term_stats: HashMap::from([\n                (\"machine\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n                (\"learning\".into(), TermStats { df: 1 }),\n            ]),\n        });\n\n        // Execute preflight to get global IDF\n        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n            terms: vec![\"machine\".into(), \"learning\".into()],\n            filter: None,\n        };\n\n        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n\n        // Verify global aggregation\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 101_010);\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().df, 10_101);\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().df, 8_081);\n\n        // Verify global IDF is the same for all shards\n        // Expected IDF for \"machine\": log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1\n        let expected_idf_machine: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 10101.0 + 0.5) / (10101.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n        let actual_idf_machine = global_idf.terms.get(\"machine\").unwrap().idf;\n        assert!((actual_idf_machine - expected_idf_machine).abs() < 0.001);\n\n        // Expected IDF for \"learning\": log((101010 - 8081 + 0.5) / (8081 + 0.5)) + 1\n        let expected_idf_learning: f64 = ((101010.0_f64 - 8081.0 + 0.5) / (8081.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n        let actual_idf_learning = global_idf.terms.get(\"learning\").unwrap().idf;\n        assert!((actual_idf_learning - expected_idf_learning).abs() < 0.001);\n\n        // Verify that without global IDF, local IDF values would differ significantly\n        // Shard 0 local IDF for \"machine\": log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.19\n        // Shard 1 local IDF for \"machine\": log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 3.20\n        // Shard 2 local IDF for \"machine\": log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.85\n        let local_idf_shard_0: f64 = ((1000.0_f64 - 100.0 + 0.5) / (100.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n        let local_idf_shard_2: f64 = ((10.0_f64 - 1.0 + 0.5) / (1.0 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0;\n        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - local_idf_shard_0).abs() > 0.2, \"Local IDF values should differ significantly\");\n        assert!((local_idf_shard_2 - actual_idf_machine).abs() > 0.3, \"Global IDF should be closer to large-shard local IDF\");\n    }\n\n    /// Test that DFS preflight handles empty query terms gracefully.\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn test_dfs_empty_query_terms() {\n        let topo = make_test_topology();\n        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n        let c = MockNodeClient::default();\n\n        let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n            index_uid: \"test\".into(),\n            terms: vec![],\n            filter: None,\n        };\n\n        let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, &c, &preflight_req, &topo).await.unwrap();\n        assert_eq!(global_idf.total_docs, 0);\n        assert!(global_idf.terms.is_empty());\n    }\n\n    /// Test that DFS preflight handles partial failures gracefully.\n    #[tokio::test]\n    async fn std::collections::hash_map::DefaultHasher;\n22\tuse std::hash::{Hash, Hasher};\n23\t\n24\t/// Request ID wrapper type for storing in axum Request extensions.\n25\t///\n26\t/// This is a newtype wrapper around the 8-character hex request ID,\n27\t/// allowing handlers to extract it via `Request.extensions().get::<RequestId>()`.\n28\t#[derive(Clone, Debug, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]\n29\tpub struct RequestId(pub String);\n30\t\n31\timpl RequestId {\n32\t    /// Create a new RequestId from a UUIDv7.\n33\t    ///\n34\t    /// Hashes the full UUIDv7 to produce an 8-character hex ID that is unique\n35\t    /// even for consecutive calls within the same millisecond.\n36\t    pub fn new() -> Self {\n37\t        let uuid = Uuid::now_v7();\n38\t        let bytes = uuid.as_bytes();\n39\t        // Hash the full UUID to ensure uniqueness even within the same millisecond\n40\t        let mut hasher = DefaultHasher::new();\n41\t        hasher.write(bytes);\n42\t        let hash = hasher.finish();\n43\t        // Take first 8 hex chars of 64-bit hash (32 bits is sufficient entropy)\n44\t        Self(format!(\"{:08x}\", hash as u32))\n45\t    }\n46\t\n47\t    /// Get the inner request ID string.\n48\t    pub fn as_str(&self) -> &str {\n49\t        &self.0\n50\t    }\n51\t\n52\t    /// Parse a RequestId from a string.\n53\t    pub fn parse(s: String) -> Option<Self> {\n54\t        if s.len() == 8 && s.chars().all(|c| c.is_ascii_hexdigit()) {\n55\t            Some(Self(s))\n56\t        } else {\n57\t            None\n58\t        }\n59\t    }\n60\t}\n61\t\n62\t/// Session ID wrapper type for read-your-writes session pinning (plan §13.6).\n63\t///\n64\t/// Extracted from the `X-Miroir-Session` header and stored in request extensions.\n65\t/// Handlers can access it via `Request.extensions().get::<SessionId>()`.\n66\t#[derive(Clone, Debug, PartialEq, Eq, Hash)]\n67\tpub struct SessionId(pub String);\n68\t\n69\timpl Default for SessionId {\n70\t    fn default() ->  }\n80\t\n81\t    /// Parse a SessionId from a string.\n82\t    ///\n83\t    /// Accepts any non-empty string (client-provided UUID or identifier).\n84\t    pub fn parse(s: String) -> Option<Self> {\n85\t        if !s.is_empty() && s.len() <= 256 {\n86\t            Some(Self(s))\n87\t        } else {\n88\t            None\n89\t        }\n90\t    }\n91\t}\n92\t\n93\tpub async fn request_id_middleware(\n94\t    mut req: Request,\n95\t    next: Next,\n96\t) -> Response {\n97\t    // Check for existing request ID in headers\n98\t    let request_id = req\n99\t        .headers()\n100\t        .get(\"x-request-id\")\n101\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n102\t        .and_then(|s| RequestId::parse(s.to_string()))\n103\t        .unwrap_or_else(RequestId::new);\n104\t\n105\t    // Store in request extensions for handler access\n106\t    req.extensions_mut().insert(request_id.clone());\n107\t\n108\t    // Set X-Request-Id header on request (for telemetry_middleware to read)\n109\t    if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(request_id.as_str()) {\n110\t        req.headers_mut().insert(\"x-request-id\", val);\n111\t    }\n112\t\n113\t    // Process the request\n114\t    let mut response = next.run(req).await;\n115\t\n116\t    // Add X-Request-Id header to response (override if exists)\n117\t    if let Ok(val) = HeaderValue::from_str(request_id.as_str()) {\n118\t        response.headers_mut().insert(\"x-request-id\", val);\n119\t    }\n120\t\n121\t    response\n122\t}\n123\t\n124\t/// Session pinning middleware (plan §13.6).\n125\t///\n126\t/// Extracts the `X-Miroir-Session` header and stores it in request extensions\n127\t/// for handlers to access via `Request.extensions().get::<SessionId>()`.\n128\tpub async fn session_pinning_middleware(\n129\t    mut req: Request,\n130\t    next: Next,\n131\t) -> Response {\n132\t    // Extract session ID from header if present\n133\t    let session_id = req\n134\t        .headers()\n135\t        .get(\"x-miroir-session\")\n136\t        .and_then(|v| v.to_str().ok())\n137\t        .and_then(|s| SessionId::parse(s.to_string()));\n138\t\n139\t    // Store in request extensions for handler access\n140\t    if let Some(sid) = session_id {\n141\t        req.extensions_mut().insert(sid);\n142\t    }\n143\t\n144\t    next.run(req).await\n145\t}\n146\t\n147\t\n148\t/// Telemetry state combining metrics and pod_id for middleware.\n149\t#[derive(Clone)]\n150\tpub struct TelemetryState {\n151\t    pub metrics: Metrics,\n152\t    pub pod_id: String,\n153\t}\n154\t\n155\timpl TelemetryState {\n156\t    pub fn new(metrics: Metrics) -> Self {\n157\t        let pod_id = std::env::var(\"POD_NAME\").unwrap_or_else(|_| \"unknown\".to_string());\n158\t        Self { metrics, pod_id }\n159\t    }\n160\t}\n161\t\n162\t/// Global metrics registry shared across all middleware instances.\n163\tpub struct Metrics {\n164\t    registry: Registry,\n165\t\n166\t    // ── Request metrics ──\n167\t    request_duration: HistogramVec,\n168\t    requests_total: explain_execute_total: Option<Counter>,\n250\t\n251\t    // ── §13.21 Search UI metrics (feature-gated) ──\n252\t    search_ui_sessions_total: Option<Counter>,\n253\t    search_ui_queries_total: background_queue_depth: GaugeVec,\n263\t    peer_pod_count: Gauge,\n264\t    leader: Gauge,\n265\t    owned_shards_count: Gauge,\n266\t\n267\t    // ── Admin session sealing metrics (always present) ──\n268\t    admin_session_key_generated: Gauge,\n269\t    admin_session_revoked_total: Counter,\n270\t\n271\t    // ── §13.5 Two-phase settings broadcast metrics (always present) ──\n272\t
